name: The HP-Compaq Merger: If There's the Will, There's a Way
description: Aberdeen InSight dated September 6, 2001 analyzing the proposed HP-Compaq merger. Kastner identifies customer concern about inward focus, product-line redundancy across servers, Unix, and services, and urges outward customer focus as the key to success. Warns that Dell, IBM, and Sun will benefit if HP-Compaq loses customer focus during integration.
